config: {"x_field": "order_date", "y_field": "profit", "y_fields": null, "aggregation": "sum", "group_by": "product_name", "filters": [], "colors": null, "title": "DateWiseProfit", "custom_sql": "SELECT order_date, sum(profit) as profit FROM dataset_59b3e729_0385_45ef_bb6f_e149375c657d GROUP BY order_date ORDER BY order_date LIMIT 200"}

name: Country Wise Profit
config: {"x_field": "country", "y_field": "sum(profit)", "y_fields": null, "aggregation": "none", "group_by": null, "filters": [], "colors": null, "title": "Country Wise Profit", "custom_sql": "SELECT \"country\", \"sum(profit)\" FROM (SELECT sum(profit),country FROM dataset_59b3e729_0385_45ef_bb6f_e149375c657d group by country) AS q ORDER BY \"country\" LIMIT 200"}

name: City Wise Profit & Revenue Chart

name: PNLData
config:
{"x_field": "city", "y_field": "TotalRevenue", "y_fields": ["TotalRevenue", "TotalProfit", "AverageCost"], "aggregation": "none", "group_by": null, "filters": [], "colors": null, "title": "PNLData", "custom_sql": "SELECT "city", SUM("TotalRevenue") AS "TotalRevenue", AVG("TotalProfit") AS "TotalProfit", SUM("AverageCost") AS "AverageCost" FROM (SELECT
  "city",
  "country",
  SUM("revenue") AS "TotalRevenue",
  SUM("profit") AS "TotalProfit",
  AVG("cost") AS "AverageCost"
FROM "dataset_59b3e729_0385_45ef_bb6f_e149375c657d"
GROUP BY "city", "country"
LIMIT 200) AS q GROUP BY "city" ORDER BY "city" LIMIT 200", "chart_type": "bar", "limit": 200, "x_fields": ["country", "city"], "field_aggregations": {"TotalRevenue": "sum", "TotalProfit": "avg", "AverageCost": "sum"}, "source_type": "query", "source_query_id": "03693546-0f87-478f-bd99-bbc24ebe9040"}
